## Description

Brief description of what was added or changed.

## Type of change

- [ ] New solution (LeetCode / ChatGPT / Interview / Other)
- [ ] Fix existing solution
- [ ] Refactor / optimization
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Solution is placed in the correct folder
- [ ] File follows the naming convention (`NN. Problem Title.ext`)
- [ ] README table updated (if new LeetCode problem)
- [ ] Code runs without errors
